overall.description: A first-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a foggy industrial parking lot at night, entering and driving a large military truck, then continuing on foot toward a massive corporate building with illuminated Delamain signage. The scene features heavy atmospheric fog, artificial teal lighting, and futuristic cyberpunk vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy industrial loading yard with food stalls

events.description: approaching and entering the cabin of the large military truck

agents.ego_description: walking through the foggy industrial yard toward the military truck and climbing into the driver's seat

notable_agents.action: worker in yellow safety gear sitting on the side of a cargo truck, looking at a device

entered.detail: blue shipping container converted to a food stall with illuminated interior and open serving window
large white industrial cargo truck with green accents and multiple axles
heavy-duty black military transport truck with KOUKAZ logo on the door
large illuminated screen displaying a food advertisement above the containers

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a foggy industrial loading area at night, passing a blue food container stall and a parked cargo truck where a worker sits. The camera approaches a large black military truck and enters the driver's cabin.

events.description: starting the engine and beginning to drive the truck forward through the fog
stopping the truck and opening the door to exit back to the parking lot

agents.ego_description: operating the military truck, navigating slowly through the foggy parking area from the interior cabin view

entered.detail: futuristic control panel with multiple monitors, steering wheel, and illuminated buttons
large cabin window showing the foggy exterior parking lot and passing vehicles
passenger side window with view of teal street lights outside

segments.scene_description: From the first-person perspective inside the truck cabin, the player drives through the foggy parking lot. The dashboard and steering wheel are visible as the vehicle moves past shipping containers and street lights visible through the side windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy corporate parking lot with scattered vehicles

events.description: exiting the truck and returning to foot perspective in the parking lot

agents.ego_description: walking away from the parked military truck through the foggy lot toward distant building lights

entered.detail: the same military truck now parked and viewed from the exterior rear quarter
tall modern street lamp emitting distinctive teal-colored illumination
dark colored sedan parked in a marked yellow-lined parking space
stacked cargo containers visible in the background fog

segments.scene_description: Back on foot, the player walks away from the parked military truck through the foggy parking lot. Teal street lights illuminate parked sedans and shipping containers scattered throughout the misty industrial area.

scene_state.functional_zone: Delamain corporate facility entrance with illuminated signage

events.description: the large Delamain building with illuminated corporate signage becomes visible through the fog

agents.ego_description: walking past parked vehicles toward the illuminated Delamain building, examining the corporate architecture

entered.detail: tall modern corporate building with multiple illuminated DELAMAIN logos on the facade
large black utility van with equipment racks on the roof

segments.scene_description: As the player continues walking, the massive Delamain corporate building emerges from the fog with its bright white signage. The camera passes a black van and approaches the loading dock area, with the military truck now visible to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a foggy industrial lot that culminates in the approach to a towering corporate monolith. It begins with a walk through a misty loading area past a blue food stall and a cargo truck before the camera enters the cabin of a large black military vehicle. As the perspective shifts to the driver's seat, the vehicle moves through the haze, passing shipping containers and street lights visible through the windows. The scene then transitions back to a pedestrian view, moving away from the parked truck through a landscape of teal-lit sedans and scattered containers. Finally, the fog parts to reveal the massive Delamain corporate building and its bright white signage as the camera passes a black van toward the loading dock.
